remarks: Newer, Sunny + Very Spacious, this Top Floor apartment in sought after Westwood has NO ADD-ON FEES! Come enjoy the designer kitchen with new granite countertops + stainless steel appliances, wide open floor plan - 800 sq. ft. - with bright rooms lined with large windows, central air, gas heat, excellent closet space and personal, in-unit washer & dryer. The popular & elegant Westwood community features impeccable maintenance and grounds care. This fabulous, top floor apartment is in a secure mid-rise building with a small fitness center and 24-hour security. Pets are Ok, Dogs  35 Lbs. only, 2-Cats Ok or 1-dog and 1-cat OK ($300 fully refundable pet deposit required). Westwood is a No Smoking Community. This is a great apartment! Please have interested prospects submit the Westwood application uploaded in supplements with a credit check through Applyconnect or Rentspree only.  PLEASE NOTE - THIS IS AN APARTMENT IN A SECURE MID-RISE BUILDING, NOT A STAND ALONE TOWNHOME.
